creator: fax@nohik.ee
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #20)
Sorry I was paste here wrong pid, as telegraf has two pids in process table, so I have done trace for telegraf process not for daemon process which pid I accidentally pasted here.

# ps xauwf | grep telegraf
telegraf      47615    1.7  0.0  5867944   216864  -  S    22:54     0:48.38 /usr/local/bin/telegraf --quiet --config=/usr/local/etc/telegraf.conf
root          47278    0.0  0.0    12828     2268  -  Is   22:54     0:00.00 daemon: /usr/local/bin/telegraf[47615] (daemon)

should I trace daemon process too ?
